name: Wacky Doodle Fixes
author: Poki
description: Wacky Doodle Fixes is a fun drawing game that’s easy to pick up and play! Just complete the missing part of each picture—whether it’s a guitar for a dinosaur or a rope for a climber. But watch out—things don’t always go as expected! With hilarious surprises and wacky twists at every turn, each level is a fresh dose of fun. Can you draw your way through the madness? How to play Wacky Doodle Fixes? Click and hold your cursor to paint. Who created Wacky Doodle Fixes? Wacky Doodle Fixes is created by 10x10 Games. Play their other game on Poki: Basket Swooshes , Free Kick Screamers , footy-zag and Detective Loupe Puzzle ! How can I play Wacky Doodle Fixes for free? You can play Wacky Doodle Fixes for free on Poki. Can I play Wacky Doodle Fixes on mobile devices and desktop? Wacky Doodle Fixes can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
